name: revit-testing
description: Write automated Revit API tests with Nice3point.TUnit.Revit.

interface.shortDescription: Test Revit API code with TUnit
interface.longDescription: Reusable workflows for TUnit-based Revit API tests, Revit-thread execution, and document fixtures.
defaultPrompt: Use Revit Testing to add a Revit API test with TUnit.
